priority_reason: Current public Jackson source lists fiscal year 2024 taxes sold in August 2025; no newer public 2025 or 2026 tax-year list was found as of 2026-03-14.
Madison's current public workbook is still the 2024 tax-year file and no public 2025 replacement workbook was found as of 2026-03-14.
Pike's public tax-sale page still links only the 2023 LANDSALE files; no public 2024, 2025, or 2026 replacement file was found as of 2026-03-14.
Jasper public delinquent-tax page currently exposes 2023 and 2024 PDFs updated in 2025; no newer public 2025 or 2026 tax-year file was found as of 2026-03-14.
Warren's public delinquent-tax page was updated in 2026, but the published list still explicitly covers fiscal year 2023; no newer public tax-year list was found as of 2026-03-14.
